signals.headline: IUML Releases First List of 25 Candidates for Kerala Assembly Election 2026** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence
signals.raw:
IUML Releases First List of 25 Candidates for Kerala Assembly Election 2026** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence

The Indian Union Muslim League (IUML) has announced its initial candidate list for 25 of 27 planned constituencies in the Kerala Legislative Assembly election scheduled for April 9, 2026, naming figures like AKM Ashraf (Manjeshwar), KM Shaji (Vengara), and Fathima Thahliya (Perambra).[1]

signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rose to 2.2% YoY, below market consensus of 2.3-2.4% due to government fuel caps offsetting oil price surges.** | YES | HIGH confidence

This data, released around April 2, 2026, shows headline CPI up from 2.0% in February but undershooting forecasts, with monthly CPI at 0.3% vs. expected 0.6%; core CPI (ex-food/energy) fell to 2.2% from 2.3%.[1][2][3] Gov
